stack_primary: Pretendard, -apple-system, system-ui, Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", "Segoe UI", "Apple SD Gothic Neo", "Noto Sans KR", sans-serif
license: OFL 1.1 (Pretendard) — free for commercial use, no attribution required for end users; redistribution must keep OFL.
delivery: Self-hosted at app.catchtable.co.kr (no fontsource / no Google Fonts request observed in initial paint).

weight_role_map.400: Body text, list items, captions, nav labels, secondary chips (~91% of all rendered text)
weight_role_map.450: Light-emphasis count text inside Swiper indicators (e.g. slide counters '2 / 25')
weight_role_map.500: Search input placeholder, chip labels, geo-toggle button, footer policy links
weight_role_map.600: Sparse — section sub-titles and small-button emphasis
weight_role_map.700: Section titles (음식종류별 BEST, 캐치 매거진), '어디로 가시나요?' search hero label, H1, price emphasis

korean_density_floor: 14px body sits at the typical KR mobile density baseline. 10/11px micro-meta is below WCAG body floor — used only for legal disclaimers and slide counters.
